allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('summary:', json.dumps\(d['summary']\)\); print\('points:', len\(d['points']\)\); print\('last 3 points:'\); [print\(' ', json.dumps\(p\)\) for p in d['points'][-3:]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in r.items\(\) if k in ['id','title','status','start','end','estEnd','progress']}\)\) for r in d['rows']]")
